block_00: What kind of trader are you?
block_01: Some say that your trading style is a reflection of your personality. If that is true, you want to know what are the options and choose a trading style that suits you best.
block_02: In this article we take a closer look at three trading styles and discuss their distinctive features. Some are long-term oriented, while the other better suit those looking for action. Some are technically oriented, others may require a deep understanding of fundamental factors. No matter what kind of person you are and what are your preferences, there is a trading style that will suit you. All you have to do is look inside yourself and give them a try.
block_03: Learn more about three distinct trading styles to choose the one that suits you.
